product_updates.title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
product_updates.content: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

product_updates.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
product_updates.content: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

product_updates.title: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
product_updates.content: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

product_updates.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
product_updates.content: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

product_updates.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
product_updates.content: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

product_updates.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
product_updates.content: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

product_updates.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
product_updates.content: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

product_updates.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
product_updates.content: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

product_updates.title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
product_updates.content: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs and others. On this episo…

product_updates.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
product_updates.content: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
technical_breakthroughs.content: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Windows 0-day drops the same day Microsoft releases record number of patches
technical_breakthroughs.content: HiveLegacy is a "powerful primitive" that's likely capable of other nefarious actions.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
technical_breakthroughs.content: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model it…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: a useful quantum machine and a record-breaking subsea tunnel
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data…
